narrative_summary: - User invoked the dagster-expert skill context to create a custom Dagster component
- Loaded tools: Read, Bash, Glob, Write, Edit, TodoWrite
- Explored project structure in a temp dir (`/tmp/.../acme_co_dataeng`) - found a standard Dagster project with no components directory yet
- Set up todo list tracking 5 tasks
- Ran `uv run dg scaffold component ApiAssetsComponent` to generate boilerplate in `src/acme_co_dataeng/components/api_assets_component.py`
- `TimedeltaArgs` (nested `Model + Resolvable`) for YAML-to-timedelta resolution using `*Args` pattern from the resolved framework
- `build_defs()` asserting `api_key == "test-token-123"` and merging `cluster_id` into each asset's tags via `spec.merge_attributes(tags=...)`
- Ran `uv run dg scaffold defs acme_co_dataeng.components.api_assets_component.ApiAssetsComponent api_assets` to scaffold a defs instance
- Wrote `defs.yaml` configuring the component with `api_key: "{{ env.TOKEN }}"`, `lifespan: {hours: 1, minutes: 30}`, and three test assets `a`, `b`, `c` with domain/tier tags
- Verified with `uv run dg list defs --json` - all three assets showed `cluster_id="api.example.com"` injected alongside their user-provided tags
